subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of the All-Glorious Beauty! 'Abdu'l-Bahá is abashed, for he hath not succeeded in servitude at the Sacred Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی عبدالبهاء شرمنده است زیرا بعبودیت عتبه مقدسه موفق نگشته پس
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @call to action, @humility; meekness; lowliness
